source_old_req: The integration system shall connect the output of sensor1 and sensor2 to the temp1 and temp2 input ports of temp_control, respectively, and shall connect the output of user_panel to the user_request input port of temp_control. The system shall ensure that the temperature values from sensor1 and sensor2 are correctly routed to the corresponding temperature input ports of the temp_control component, and that commands from the user_panel are correctly routed to the user_request input port of the temp_control component, supporting future extensions for end-to-end consistency verification from sensor identification to actuator response.
natural_requirement: The temp_control component shall define the implementation-level data routing and execution constraints for temp_control.i. In the implementation layer, temp_control.i shall route signal flow from temp1 to voter.tempin1 through c0 and signal flow from temp2 to voter.tempin2 through c1. Additionally, temp_control.i shall use immediate communication timing on connection c0, use immediate communication timing on connection c1, use immediate communication timing on connection c2, and use immediate communication timing on connection c3.

requirement_items.text: The temp_control.i implementation shall route the signal flow from temp1 to voter.tempin1 through connection c0.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The temp_control.i implementation shall declare connection c0 from temp1 to voter.tempin1.

requirement_items.text: The temp_control.i implementation shall route the signal flow from temp2 to voter.tempin2 through connection c1.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The temp_control.i implementation shall declare connection c1 from temp2 to voter.tempin2.

requirement_items.text: The temp_control.i implementation shall use immediate communication timing on connection c0.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The temp_control.i implementation shall assign communication_properties::timing on connection c0 as immediate.

requirement_items.text: The temp_control.i implementation shall use immediate communication timing on connection c1.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The temp_control.i implementation shall assign communication_properties::timing on connection c1 as immediate.

requirement_items.text: The temp_control.i implementation shall use immediate communication timing on connection c2.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The temp_control.i implementation shall assign communication_properties::timing on connection c2 as immediate.

requirement_items.text: The temp_control.i implementation shall use immediate communication timing on connection c3.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The temp_control.i implementation shall assign communication_properties::timing on connection c3 as immediate.

quality_policy.traceable: Every item has trace_refs and expected_check metadata tied to AADL facts.
quality_policy.principle: Every generated sentence must name an explicit property assignment or structural connection; ordinary feature declarations are not used as rebuilt requirements.

natural_requirement_before_behavior_styl: The temp_control.i implementation shall declare connection c0 from temp1 to voter.tempin1. The temp_control.i implementation shall declare connection c1 from temp2 to voter.tempin2. The temp_control.i implementation shall assign communication_properties::timing on connection c0 as immediate. The temp_control.i implementation shall assign communication_properties::timing on connection c1 as immediate. The temp_control.i implementation shall assign communication_properties::timing on connection c2 as immediate. The temp_control.i implementation shall assign communication_properties::timing on connection c3 as immediate.

behavior_style_policy.basis: front-110 AGREE-derived requirements favor implementable behavior, constants, assumptions, guarantees, routing, and bounded properties.
behavior_style_policy.rule: Do not describe unsupported validity/legal-boundary semantics unless the AADL model exposes variables, values, or properties that can implement them.

natural_requirement_before_paragraph_rew: The temp_control.i implementation shall route the signal flow from temp1 to voter.tempin1 through connection c0. The temp_control.i implementation shall route the signal flow from temp2 to voter.tempin2 through connection c1. The temp_control.i implementation shall use immediate communication timing on connection c0. The temp_control.i implementation shall use immediate communication timing on connection c1. The temp_control.i implementation shall use immediate communication timing on connection c2. The temp_control.i implementation shall use immediate communication timing on connection c3.

paragraph_style_policy.rule: Req.txt is written as a natural-language requirement paragraph; per-item traceability stays in requirement_items.
paragraph_style_policy.basis: Front-110 AGREE-derived requirements generally combine function, assumptions, guarantees, and implementation notes into 1-4 sentence paragraphs.
